goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should have 'a star of 3'.
The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 13:30' and should depart from 'peterborough'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should have a star of 3
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free parking
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 13:30 and should depart from peterborough
The train should leave on monday and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID
